name: agent-on-ramp-coach
description: Helps hesitant engineers adopt AI coding agents through safe confidence levels, read-only workflows, approval gates, and reviewable summaries.

interface.shortDescription: Help engineers adopt coding agents through safe confidence levels and reviewable sessions.
interface.longDescription: Agent On-Ramp Coach provides cross-agent adoption workflows that default to read-only analysis, classify risk, select the lowest useful confidence level, require explicit approval before edits, and record what was read, suggested, changed, and verified.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent On-Ramp Coach for this engineering task.
Start read-only and recommend the lowest useful confidence level.
Create the on-ramp session artifacts before meaningful work.
Ask for explicit approval before edits.
